criteria.name: conclusion_first
criteria.description: Brief leads with actionable conclusion, not background

criteria.name: google_doc_delivered
criteria.description: Uploaded to BCI Drive as Google Doc and link sent to Mark

criteria.name: scope_accuracy
criteria.description: Answered the actual question asked, not adjacent topics

criteria.name: competitor_coverage
criteria.description: All relevant competitors identified (not just top 3)

criteria.name: data_freshness
criteria.description: Pricing and feature data observed with dates noted

criteria.name: comparison_clarity
criteria.description: Comparison table is scannable and actionable

criteria.name: recommendation_quality
criteria.description: Recommendations are specific and tied to BCI's position

criteria.name: scholarflow_used
criteria.description: ScholarFlow queried for peer-reviewed sources (not just web search)

criteria.name: regulatory_context
criteria.description: Health Canada/FDA regulatory status included where relevant

criteria.name: evidence_grading
criteria.description: Each claim tagged with confidence level (high/medium/low)

criteria.name: no_health_claims
criteria.description: Information presented as research, never as medical recommendations
